lessonTitleText: Elijah vs. the Prophets of Baal
lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: How long had Israel gone without rain?
What did Elijah tell Ahab to do?
answers: Gather the prophets and people on Mount Carmel

questions.text: What did Elijah want the people to decide?
answers: Who the real God is — the Lord or Baal
Who should be king – Elijah or Ahab
What they wanted to eat for dinner
Where to build a new temple
The God who answers a prayer with fire wins

questions.text: How many prophets of Baal were there, and how long did they pray?
answers: 450 prophets prayed from morning until noon

questions.text: How did Elijah make fun of Baal?
answers: He said maybe Baal was asleep,on a trip, or using the bathroom
He shouted mean words at him
He dressed up like Baal and acted like a fool

questions.text: What did Elijah have done to the Lord’s altar?
answers: Water was poured on it three times
He had them knock it down
God sent fire that burned everything — even the water
An angel came down and lit a fire on the altar

questions.text: What did the people shout after seeing the fire?
answers: The Lord is the one and only God!
Aah! We are going to die!

questions.text: What did God do after the mountaintop contest?
answers: He made Elijah the new king
